title: rosa × subglabra
intro: Rosa × subglabra is a hybrid rose species known for its medicinal properties and health benefits. It is primarily used as a herbal remedy for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as infusions, salves, and creams to promote wound healing, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Rosa × subglabra is also used to treat digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
